title: Marshal (disambiguation)
content:
'''Marshal''' or '''Marshall''' could refer to one of the following:

==[[In-universe]]==
===[[Canon]]===
*'''[[Marshal]]''', a position held by [[Phara]]
*'''[[Clone Marshal Commander]]''', a high-[[Military rank|ranking]] [[Clone Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic]]
*'''[[Grand Marshal]]''', a title desired by [[First Order]] [[General]] [[Armitage Hux]]
*'''[[Provost marshal]]''', an [[officer]] in charge of military discipline within a command

===[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]===
====Ranks and titles====
=====[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]=====
*'''[[Air Marshal of the Republic]]''', an honorary title during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]
*'''[[Clone marshal commander]]''', a high-ranking [[clone trooper commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]
*'''[[Grand Marshal/Legends|Grand Marshal]]''', a high military rank in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]
*'''[[Provost Marshal]]''', a rank granted to [[Fideltin Rusk]] while he was in command of the [[Dead Man's Legion]] in the [[Republic Army]]
*'''[[Republic Marshall]]s''', a law enforcement presence on [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] and subsequent [[Galactic War]]

=====Other=====
*'''[[Marshal/Legends|Marshal]]''', a [[Law enforcement agency|law enforcement]] official on outlying colony worlds
*'''[[Air Marshal]]''', a [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]
*'''[[Alliance Marshal]]''', [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Police officer/Legends|law enforcement officers]] answering to the [[Office of the Chief of State]]
*'''[[Field Marshal/Legends|Field Marshal]]''', a rank used by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Neo-Crusaders]]
*'''[[Grand Marshal of the Blockade Runners Derby]]''', honorary position in the [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] [[Blockade Runners Derby]]
*'''[[High Marshal]]''', a rank used by the [[Iron Knight]]s during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
*'''High Marshal of Ailon''', of the [[Ailon Nova Guard/Legends|Ailon Nova Guard]]
*'''[[Surface Marshal]]''', a rank in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]
*'''[[Ground Marshal]]''', a rank in the [[Alliance Military/Legends|Alliance Military]]

====Other====
*'''[[Marshall]]''', a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the Galactic Republic
*'''''[[Marshall Awe]]''''', Imperial [[Starship/Legends|starship]] commanded by Captain [[Strayit]] where [[Zertik Strom/Legends|Zertik Strom]] served as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]]
*'''[[Rexellian Marshall]]''', [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] soldier serving under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]

==Real world==
*'''[[Marshall Andrews III]]''', an illustrator and artist
*'''[[Liz Cummings]]''', née '''Liz Marshall''', production manager at [[Lucasfilm Animation]]
*'''[[Dave Marshall]]''', assistant editor on multiple [[Dark Horse Comics]] projects
*'''[[Darren Marshall]]''', sculptor and design artist who designed the characters for ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''
*'''[[Rocky Marshall]]''', actor who portrayed [[Colonel]] [[Erich S. Datoo]] in [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']]
*'''[[Vanessa Marshall]]''', a voice actress on several Legends video games and ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]''
*"'''[[Marshalling the Troops!]]'''," a ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' interview with ''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' line producer [[Athena Yvette Portillo]]

{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|ja=保安官（曖昧さ回避）
}}
